title: SRP: Thigh Highed Horrors
description: Makes the Textures of SRP mobs funnier
body:
**Makes the Scape and Run: Parasites textures funnier, gives them various accessories and makes them overall more lovely.** 

If you'd like to just change the parasites' textures, theres lite versions on the versions submenu!!!!!

Textures made by 21Fishbowls (hates his own abominations), Spukuz, UwU_Peanut, Neptune2, and Evan_Wingerter (Me!)
